Free Tour

Westhive Kitchen

Zurich Hardturm

Hardturmstrasse 161, 8005 Zurich

Menü anzeigen

Opening hours:
Monday – Wednesday & Friday: 07:30h – 17:00h
Thursday: 07:30h – 18:00h

Kitchen opening hours: 11:30h – 14:00h

Highlights

Bill's Burger

Grilled Caesar Salad Bowl

Chicken thigh steak, bacon, avocado, iceberg lettuce, lettuce, croutons, Grana Padano, herb vinaigrette, Caesar dressing

18.90

Seasonal

Summer Salad

Chickpeas, pomegranate seeds, diced cucumber, cherry tomatoes, romaine lettuce, leaf lettuce, watercress

14.90

Daily Lunch Menu

Wednesday, 24.06.2026
Grilled chicken thigh steaks with tomato salsa, herb rice, courgettes and peppers
19.90
Thursday, 25.06.2026
Veal escalope, plain, served with a mixed vegetable salad and a chive and yoghurt sauce
21.90
Friday, 26.06.2026
Homemade beef or vegetarian lasagne al forno with a crisp rocket salad
19.90

Weekly Specials

Soup
Asparagus
7.00 / 11.50
Pasta
Puttanesca
14.90
Dessert
Apple and poppy seed cake
3.90
Full menu

* vegetarian (without meat/fish) – limited number

All prices in CHF incl. 8.1% VAT

Unless stated otherwise, our meat originates from the following countries:
chicken, beef, veal, pork: Switzerland – turkey: Hungary – salmon: Norway

Dear guest

We want to know your opinion and your personal suggestions for improving Westhive Kitchen. We appreciate any feedback to make your next visit even better!

Give Feedback

Bill's Burger

Zurich Hardturm

100% Angus Beef. Or 100% vegi. But always burgers. And always freshly prepared.

www.billsburger.ch

Event Location

Rent Westhive Kitchen

Our «Westhive Kitchen» can also be booked for your event – including a customized catering from our kitchen team.

Learn more

Food Gallery

Bier um Vier

Every Thursday from 16:00h to 18:00h

For members the first beer is on the house.

Every Thursday we invite you to toast the past week and ring in the weekend. Have a beer with your colleagues, wash down any anger you may have had, and look forward to next Monday at Westhive.  ;-)

I am a button

Arrival

By car

The parking spaces directly at Hardturmstrasse 161 are rented. We recommend using the «P West» parking garage right next door.

By plane

A cab or public transport will take you from Zurich Airport to Westhive Zurich Hardturm in about half an hour.

By public transport

The streetcar stop Fischerweg is located exactly opposite our coworking space. From Zurich Main Station the journey takes 10 minutes (streetcar 17), from Zurich Hardbrücke 7 minutes (streetcar 8). To the ZVV timetable.

Contact us

We are happy to hear from you

Vanessa Baratelli

F&B Manager Zurich Hardturm

+41 43 444 68 10

hardturm@westhive.com
